audit_items.proof_trace: After each fork upgrade, per_slot_processing calls state.build_caches(spec) at L89, which rebuilds all committee caches. Committee caches depend on static ChainSpec parameters (min_seed_lookahead, shuffle_round_count, domain constants) that don't change across forks. Pre-fork caches remain valid post-fork because the shuffling algorithm is fork-agnostic.
